creator: strijar@urai.ru
text:
When IPX is up (in kernel and interface) and loaded any modules ng_*
(i'm run pppoed - ng_pppoe, and others) stop system in 5-10 sec,
and reboot without warning

How-To-Repeat: 	in kernel config: options IPX
	kldload ncp.ko
	IPXrouted
	ifconfig rl0 ipx 0x0a
	pppoed rl0
